arts.ttl: Lookman to Arsenal? Nigeria teammate CONFIRMS interest
arts.sum: Nigeria captain William Troost-Ekong has confirmed that 'big clubs' have been keen on Ademola Lookman since his hattrick in the Europa League final. According to Nigeria captain William Troost-Ekong, the speculation surrounding Lookman's future is well-founded as he indeed has high-profile suitors, though he refrained from explicitly mentioning Arsenal .

arts.ttl: How to watch Arsenal vs Everton - TV channel, live stream details and kick-off time - football.london
arts.sum: Arsenal's home game with Everton is due to kick-off at 3pm on Saturday, December 14 at the Emirates Stadium. The North Londoners are in action this weekend at the same time as Arne Slot's men this weekend with Man City facing Man United on Sunday and Chelsea hosting Brentford later in the day.

arts.ttl: Arsenal two games away from nightmare Premier League scenario over Christmas
arts.sum: Jorginho, Rice, Saka and Timber are less of an immediate concern but if they pick up another two yellow cards in the Premier League, they shall also face a one-game suspension. Jesus is the immediate concern for Arsenal as he sits on four cautions in the Premier League this season.

arts.ttl: Arsenal vs Everton TV channel, live stream and how to watch Premier League clash
arts.sum: Latest Everton news as Sean Dyche's men face a tough trip to the Emirates Stadium to take on title chasers Arsenal

arts.ttl: ‘I expect’: Paul Merson has now predicted the result of Arsenal vs Everton on Saturday
arts.sum: Arsenal face Everton on Saturday in what could be a very tricky game for the Gunners. It’s Set-Piece FC vs Set-Piece FC at the Emirates...

arts.ttl: Raheem Sterling told by Arsenal boss why he's not played more - and it's NOT tactics
arts.sum: Raheem Sterling has not received many opportunities for Arsenal since joining the club on loan from Chelsea and Gunners boss Mikel Arteta has now explained the reasons why

arts.ttl: Liverpool vs. Fulham: Arne Slot must avoid Arsenal mistake in Premier League title race to keep Chelsea, Manchester City at bay
arts.sum: Liverpool must beat Fulham and avoid repeating Arsenal's mistakes in order to maintain their commanding position at the top of the Premier League table.

arts.ttl: 'People joke': Chris Sutton baffled by what he's been hearing about Arsenal lately
arts.sum: Arsenal are doing very well at the minute as they remain firmly in the Premier League title picture and are also excelling in the Champions...

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta sack message handed to Arsenal chiefs during Everton game changed everything
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta is synonymous with Arsenal's success in recent years, but the Spaniard's situation at the helm was dire once upon a time as he had to be defended from a premature sacking

arts.ttl: Why Arsenal vs Everton isn't on TV explained as rule blocks Premier League broadcast
arts.sum: However, fans in the United Kingdom will be unable to broadcast the visit of Everton live due to the 3pm blackout rules in place that prohibit the live showing of games in England. Here, football.london explains why the game isn't on TV and how the blackout rules work.
